starbucks, a place that is, quite literally on every corner. now o'days seeing it can be an eyesore, and the coffee quite lackluster. but man there is no way i can give two stars to starbucks, not after all the times it has saved my life from a near coma during work. the staff is alert and friendly, always on the ball, even better they are fast (fast food... coffee style). i can get a regular cup of coffee, exactly how i like it, at a pace that will make your head spin. so what if the coffee comes from some mans diarrhea that gets sprayed out of a machine, it wakes you up... all i can ask for when in a hurry. overall: the coffee aint the best... but its good enough. lol.

this starbucks is bigger in area than most and has good wifi and access to power plugs on the "bench" seating close to where you pick up your drinks. there is a nice patio area with umbrella tables and a great view of the sierras. the staff is on the ball, polite and efficient. in this starbucks you can actually put some tables together and have meeting. the drinks are consistent with starbucks standards so if you like starbucks coffee you will like it, if not you won't.

wow, this sb location definitely has an efficiency problem. average wait for grande cappuccino = 15 mins minimum. 5 of those minutes may just be waiting to order once you've reached the front of the line. i cringe at watching all the slow moving wasted low energy. if you are in a hurry, go somes place else!

growing up in this area, starbucks has always been my only consistent friend. i have been going here since highschool, college, got married and now raise 2 beautiful sons, bought my first house.and everytime i feel happy or down, of course i never forget to stop by this starbucks. every morning when i walk in, i feel like home away from home. smell of brewing coffee and the staffs are extremely friendly. they always make you feel special by remembering your name and the right cup of coffee. little things like that definitely help especially when you feel shitty that day.

exiting crate & barrell, i needed a pick me up to continue on my day in tampa and decided to stroll in. everyone is always so friendly here & my order was taken with a smile and was prepared quickly. they have a drive through for those who are on the run and still deserve their caffeine oomph. the entrance is a bit weird because it's a double lane that cuts off into a weird yielding turn so if there's traffic, you can be stuck on either side for a while. the wifi is always strong and since the coffee shop is very clean- it allows for a laptop session alongside your iced coffee. there's a hunch if outlets everywhere which is probably due to them being a newer and more renovated location. starbucks is always a good idea so when you're in the area, stop by for a quick caffeine boost. you'll be glad you did!

the customer service is great and what can i say....starbucks has the best coffee, cake pops aroumd! i love halloween time, my favorite pumpkin spice frap is available. i wish they'd bring back the unicorn frap. i was unable to get the sour sauce in mine when i had it since everyone ran out of it but it was still delicious. the insides cozy and they have two lounge chairs by the door.

it's starbucks. i've never understood high priced coffees but a large or "venti" blonde roast coffee is $2 same as any place else. this place has a great crew and a good comfortable environment to enjoy your coffee. i am a regular here and if i have one complaint it would be that it is on a busy street with a main bus route that leads to some oddballs coming through door but hey one persons oddball is another persons friend so what should i care?

i came through the drive through at 9:55pm. yes i understand they close at 10pm but they could've at least told me sorry we shut everything down or something so after waiting at the order microphone for a bit i go to the window and the worker ignored me. i'm sorry but this is ridiculous. this was the first al straw with them. they have always been rude and had an attitude with me. the starbucks on pyramid in the shopping center with the car wash and the one in spanish springs has much better customer service!
not the starbucks quality i have become used to. my cup got pushed to the back of the line. at least 10 peoples drinks were made before mine that were behind me in line.

granted this place is in a tough spot, in iv and packed with students but as a student myself it's frustrating how bad the service here can get. i usually stop by in a rush, like most others here i'm sure. the coffee bar (hand crafted) drinks are consistent. the problem is the poor service and dirty environment. for example, once witnessed an employee clean the bathroom and come out with the dustpan with floor bathroom dirt and throw it away in the sink behind the counter, next to the coffee machines.
coffee is awesome of course, but what i don't get is why they close so early!?!?! i don't know if it's an arizona thing, but usually in ny you can be in the burbs and the coffee joints are 24hrs.

my local starbucks and my favorite one. i will drive out of the way to go here. one of their manager's here has always been so helpful and helping me picking out christmas gifts. but this place is well ran and always are timely and accurate. only once have i had to go back inside after being in the drive through. i've been here alot! my favorite by far is pumpkin spice latte skinny with whip. =) nom nom. p.s. the parking lot sucks! people can't drive because of how it is shaped.
my order is always been correct employees are always courteous it simply makes my day or morning even if i go through the drive-through

i stopped into this starbucks quite by accident while traveling for the holidays. it appears to be quite new, very clean and quite busy, even on thanksgiving day, as were the nearby target and other businesses. the service was also quite good.

this starbucks always has a long drive thru line. the first time i decided to brave the wait, i was in line for over 25 minutes. really. in the last month i have decided to skip the need for a chai because of long lines a handful of times. this morning there was actually a line short enough that i wasn't sticking out into the parking lot. i got my chai in about 10 minutes, though it was quite watered down. disappointed in this location.
whomever your blonde barista is needs to leave. she was so mean to my boyfriend taking his order and made the worst drink. she didn't even give him a whole cup. we'll never be back there again.

disappointed with the service of this location. ordered ahead through the app so i wouldn't have to stand in line. my coffee was ready but the food wasn't. i asked about the food; the response i got was "i just do drinks." okay, but what about the rest of my order...she walked away. finally i see a food item put into the pickup section. it was mine...but where was the rest of it. sat back down and continued to wait. finally went back to ask and they said they're working on it. once the guy came over with my oatmeal he had the wrong kind. ordered blueberry but got the classic. guess they figured i didn't want or need agave syrup and the nut medley. at least he tossed in the berries. needless to say, i won't be going back if i'm ordering food. service was slow and my order was wrong.
the staff is always friendly and helpful. even though my order is pretty simple people don't always get it how i like it all the time ...today it was perfect which so made my day!
they always get my order right but i wish they had more tables because this place is always poppin' and there's not enough room to study. the baristas are so kind and always welcoming!

i really gave this place a few shots before posting this review because starbucks are busy, i get it. but i have had a few instances in the past week that i've never seen at another starbucks in all of my years of buying their coffee. earlier this week, i put in a mobile order and arrived about 10 minutes later when the estimated time was 4-7 minutes. i got there and there was one man in line, and two girls behind the counter. the one was working on someone else's drink (maybe another mobile order i assumed). turned out, it was the man who had only just ordered. i always understood mobile orders to be your place in line, but i didn't say anything. i waited about 8 minutes for my whole order (i got multiple drinks but the longest thing i waited on was food because one of the girls behind the counter was stocking lids very slowly instead of making anything). the next day, i put my mobile in earlier expecting the wait to be longer as it was a monday. put it through about 15 minutes early, still the whole order was not ready when i arrived! took at least another 10 minutes for them to realize that they never finished one drink. then this morning, i put in my mobile order in early. it was a saturday at like 630 am, so in my mind, it would be more than enough time. i arrived and stood around because the drink wasn't ready yet. found it odd because as i was standing there the workers didn't say anything. finally, i asked if my drink was waiting behind the counter or something. this is when someone finally informed me that the espresso machine had not been cleaned, so she couldn't actually make my drink as the machine wasn't working. i was trying to catch a train, had stood there for several minutes before i even said anything, and at the very least the employee could've reimbursed me on a gift card and left that out to let me know something wasn't right. i will not go back to this location. in all honesty, it's never busy, which i have to assume is because so many others before me have come to the same conclusion.

not going to go harsh on this particular starbucks & i'll give them the benefit of the doubt. i came in around 1:00 p.m. and it seemed like there was only one poor employee doing it all. she managed to move the line along fairly well but i felt bad for her, since she looked so harried. starbucks is clearly able to keep enough people around slamming out over-priced coffee drinks, where this poor soul should not be doing it all. i visited the bathroom, where you need a code and they had run out of t.p. which i brought to the attention of the lonely barista. to starbuck's. credit, there was paper in the bathroom later after i came back after my visit to the salt cave. at this 800 state street starbucks, there was a big christmas tree put up, which i stood by admiring. it was a nice holiday touch. also, i had never seen a two-story caffeine-peddler store, whereby you can go upstairs to rest in peace and look down upon (literally) the other patrons. i would just advise that the store is staffed properly so that one person behind the counter doesn't have to do it all. later, i did see two other employees and felt better about things. 4 yelp stars.

i love the fact that this starbucks is close by my school and they have a drive thru but this is the second time i've received the wrong order! if you are in a hurry i would not advise you to go here early in the morning looking for great service. overall the drink was tasty but the sandwich i was given was completely horrible!!!!

the team that works at this location is nothing short of amazing. you made my day with your great service when i had a problem, no question asked. i couldn't ask for more. try the pineapple infused back tea, zero calories and it tastes like you're on a tropical island. see you tomorrow guys.

with a great downtown location, this is a great spot to step in and grab a coffee or tea. their staff are very friendly, and great at giving recommendations if you aren't a good decision maker like myself. they have a small pastry section if you need a small bite of food, and are attached to the courtyard which is great for hotel guests in the morning. keep in mind that this isn't the kind of starbucks that you bring your laptop and backpack to. there's one tiny table, and it's not necessarily a comfortable place to just hang out in. there's one small table in the corner of the room, and that's it. the only downside to my visits here that i've encountered is that it's not necessarily sparkling clean. often times the counter will be a bit messy or full of crumbs and spilt drinks (granted it's a food shop, and customers tend to drops things).
always fast and staffs a pleasure. i literally haven't ever had my order messed up!). i'm loving that they all pay close attention to the order given by costumers

i feel almost silly writing a review for a chain restaurant, but the service here is just beyond amazing. this starbucks is located on a very busy corner, and it is not unusual to find a line from the front-door all the way to the ordering counter. despite this, and despite the fact that is only one store-front out of a chain of thousands (millions?), the staff has made it so that you feel like you're in your neighborhood coffee shop. they know the customers by name, and their orders by heart. i barely even have to speak upon entry-- they ask me if i'm getting my usual, and moments later it's delivered into my hand. i love this place, and they set the bar extremely high for not only every other starbucks location, but for every coffee shop in general.
this used to be an extremely slow starbucks, but they hired additional staff and now it operates quickly.

i can't use mobile ordering here (hence the crazy long line) and i also cannot redeem rewards here. i can use my starbucks card to earn rewards but that's about it at this location. i try to avoid it but since i was coming to the ucsb bookstore for the sale anyhow, i'm braving the line. i'll stick with the iv starbucks from now on.

probably the most unfriendly baristas i've ever encountered at any starbucks in the country. no joke. glad i will likely not be in this area again any time soon or i would probably be annoyed on a regular basis.

clean, friendly, quaint, and fast service. i arrived at 6:30 pm and nobody was in line. just as i was paying for my medium green tea lemonade with a dash of apple juice & whipped cream, my order was ready! as a kid at heart, i love whipped cream and always ask for it with any drink and they kindly accommodate me! i can't wait to go back, but wish the drinks weren't so expensive. :'( excellent customer service!

its starbucks! when you catch a 550am flight out of new orleans to tampa and get a coffee ( double shot espresso) right outside the gate you just fell out of, yep! better than sex.....!!!!!! and in an airport, yep. you gotta wait in line since i'm not the only one who lives there... and yes, it's not cheap!!! since when did you ever have something cheap at the airport? a pack of gum is $3, and bottled water is $4....suck it up. your traveling, expect it!!!!! got another one in atlanta 2 hrs later!!!!

starbucks is as starbucks does! this store consistently has good drinks and hot food, but consistently slow service. be prepared to wait. if there are more than 3 cars in the drive thru - skip it and pick a different location.

extremely rude older lady with blonde hair running the drive thru. argued with me over making my drink wrong after she made it wrong twice, and i watched her fill my pink drink half with water. won't be coming back here again. management you need to take a look a your employee.

love that starbucks has a drive-through! makes it seriously convenient for anybody on the go, especially with young children intel. great service, friendly staff, always a pleasure to frequent a starbucks.

i don't know if what i encountered at this starbucks today was a new barrista, sheer incompetence, or lack of attention being paid because i ordered a hot chocolate and receive instead, a cup of hot milk. my order was slightly complicated, but not hard enough to confuse hot chocolate with simple milk. the mistake was even more disappointing because there was literally no one else ordering at the time so the barristas were not in any type of rush. will most definitely not be returning to this starbucks. 100% waste of money.
staff is very friendly in the morning but when i come in in the afternoon they are always playing abrasive rap music. don't really want to hear nwords and fbombs when i get my coffee.

i work in the shopping center and i am glad to have this specific starbucks in the area. the staff is always helpful. and wait time is minimal. i recently started using the mobile order and by the time i walk over there my drink is ready to go.
when the free monday holiday treat didn't come off my bill the barista went to fix it, he said my whole bill was on them. i love when they're so kind to their customers.

so.... i waited to visit this location a couple of times before writing this review. i visited saturday 9.14.19, sunday 9.15.19 and today 9.16.19. i read the reviews about how slow the store runs, how long the lines were, etc. i love starbucks and sometimes i feel that yelpers give negative or bad reviews just because they have nothing better to do. (most yelpers who give bad reviews have lots of negative reviews on their page) my first visit to this location was saturday september 14, 2019. it was around 4pm and the store was crowded. there were at least six baristas behind the counter, but it just didn't seem like they were moving "fast enough" to accommodate the crowd of people wanting their starbucks fix. this visit, i purchased: a treinta iced passion tango tea lemonade, a tall salted caramel mocha frappuccino and two protein boxes (pb&j on wheat|smoked turkey). the barista prepared my tea as a tall as opposed to a treinta. it was horrible and i waited for such a long time, i thought i was going to miss my bus to work. my second visit was sunday september 15, 2019. after saturday's visit, i was in and out simply because i didn't purchase a drink. there was still a crowd of people to wade through. my third visit today was in the morning before the mall even opened. i was one of two customers in the store. the barista looked as if he was tired and really didn't want to be there. i purchased two cheese danishes and a tall iced passion tango tea lemonade. it took forever!!! i actually missed my bus to go home. it seems like there is no set time of day that will get in|out quickly (even if your purchase isn't complicated). you may want to visit this location if you are strolling around the mall and have the time and patience. also apparently this location is in the hiring process for a new store manager. maybe they need someone to whip the employees into shape, elevate morale and create better customer service.

starbucks is starbucks.... we know what we are getting when we walk in... this place receives 3 stars today, which i'll modify if needed at another point, for them moving orders in front of mine. it wasn't b/c i ordered a fancy coffee, they just literally past mine over which caused my stay to be 15+ minutes. there was no apology and no urgency to fix....maybe 4 people receiving their drinks prior to me who ordered after is suitable for this location, but not suitable for me

seems like the employees at the newest local starbucks may be getting a bit jaded already. how about filling the drinks all the way to top guys? it isn't like they are inexpensive courtesy cups or something.
the lady who doesn't brush her hair was being so rude and did not smile , was not polite. made a nasty face because of my ethnic name. rude. definitely will not return.
very nice starbucks - lots of outdoor seating & the baristas have always been pleasant. drinks & food are consistent with starbucks quality.
love this location always friendly. if the line is long no worries they move fast. i will be going back to this location for sure.

i have ordered a couple of times here and sometimes their coffee is good, but on occasion you get a cup of milk with watered down coffee. on one occasion i asked for a caramel macchiato and it tasted like milk with caramel. no coffee whatsoever, and i was disappointed because i love starbucks! but overall it's a good way to grab a quick coffee if your on the go or if you're late. and the next time, i might ask for an extra shot in my macchiato :). "happy eating!"
this location is constantly understaffed .. wait time is absolutely awful ..morning , day of night ..

ordered drinks for "here" to drink in the restaurant on a slow day. just a few moments later i clarified that meant i wanted the drinks in coffee cups instead of to go cups. the real poner of the employee was, " well we've already started making the drinks" and made them in to go cups anyway. $10 for two drinks. i think this place has forgotten that what makes the drinks worth that is the service and atmosphere. disappointed that this store seems to have the attitude of a glorified mcdonalds.

we decided to stop in after an afternoon of shopping at the westfield brandon mall. it was a good decision. we wanted to try their new blonde espresso. i think it's a great idea to have two different types of espresso. most people who complain about the burnt bean taste should really like this smoother version. there is definitely no bitterness. it's actually quite smooth. i had the blonde latte. i thought it was very milky & creamy. i love milk, so i was happy with it. i noticed that you don't need to add as much sugar to the drink. my mother liked her shot of blonde espresso, but she felt that she needed more than one shot. it was gone in one gulp. the location is very busy. i give them a pass when it comes to cleanliness. i do think that they may need more staff because the floors and tables needed attention. the garbage bins were overflowing as well. if anything, they just need an extra person to maintain that part of the business. other than that, the service was great. we were quite happy overall.
depends on who is working, but this location is pretty slow. i do really like the people that work here, super friendly!

i ordered my coffee and breakfast eggs this morning. coffee came and then finally 15 minutes after i was able to get someone's attention about my food being skipped. barista was unhelpful asked me to order again, i showed him my order then proceeded to fill other peoples orders after mine. after 30 minutes left after demanding refund and nothing happening. i go here 6 days a week very disappointed
nice coffee, but the customer service is not nice. she rushes me on ordering while i tried to order green tea fraps.

starbucks is starbucks here or in seatle. lots of seating, coffee wharehouse feel. the coffee is too strong for my taste, i always ask for half a shot to any latte. i do like their green tea lattes though. they are tealicious. ;-)
friendly, helpful employees (thank you, denny!) drive thru and counter service expeditious service 5 / 5!

this is a fantastic starbucks in the heart of downtown franklin. good line management, friendly baristas and clean store. excited to see what the remodel brings. it is a great starbucks but if you are visiting and want something local walk down the same street to frothy monkey for an amazing local business that has a coffee stand inside their cafe/restaurant.
over 23 min for two drinks. scorching hot coffee and iced cold hot chocolate. crew inside is oblivious to what they are doing.

i have driven past the location numerous times and didn't even realize it was there. i went in because i just didn't know what i wanted. i had a great experience staff rocked and the location was clean, lots of people inside working away on their computers :) it was great. coffee delicious and a yummy breakfast bacon and egg sandwich .. happy tummy!

this place is the worst! slow, even when you order ahead on the app, you wait 10 minutes past the time stated. the employees are untrained or lazy, the manager should be replaced. worst starbucks in philadelphia.

employees are always friendly. lines can tend to be long at times but it's worth the wait. i'm a creature of habit and typically order a caramel macchiato most days. absolutely love their scones as well!

this is a very small starbucks location, but it's just as good - or better - than others! because of the small size, it feels more "coffeehouse" and quaint, and when it's not too busy, it's a very peaceful place to enjoy a cup of coffee and read or relax for a bit. the employees are always very nice and really helpful, and willing to make your food exactly how you like it. the condiment bar has always been fully stocked, clean, and large enough for multiple people to use at the same time. the tables are usually clean and tidy. i'm glad there's a starbucks location towards the outskirts of tucson!

this location is such a delight to visit. the store manager here really cares about his customers, his employees, and the brand. you'd think that being in the middle of the mall would cause this location to be crazy loud and congested, but they do a great job keeping lines short, and sharing smiles with customers. i've been here many times and will keep coming back to enjoy my standard coffee and breakfast sandwich.

pros: i always hit this place at low traffic. never waited more than 2-3 minutes for my tried and true iced coffee with cream, no sugar. of course that -is- probably the quickest prep item there. the wifi is quick, regularly see downloads of 100-200k/sec from major sites. i do spend time here looking at my serato whitelabel releases and have no complaints. cons: store is anchored on east side of strip mall, which means the slim layout of the place + most of seating on the east can make for toasty morning visits during the summer even with the blinds down. the parking lot can feel be tricky at times, people drive way too fast through the narrow lanes so triple check before you back out of your spot when it is busy. baristas are all nice to me, so over time i've gotten to like this location even more. it's walking into a cheers episode.

horrible. service is super slow. went in on a saturday morning and am still waiting on my drink currently after placing it 45 minutes ago. they need to pick it up! it'll be dinner before i get my coffee. if you want coffee for dinner, go to this starbucks! lost my service for sure.

i've always been a lover of starbucks, however this visit has changed my mind. my first few second of talking to the drive thru worker named dan were awful. i kindly asked him if we could pay separately for the two drinks and he refused. after i asked why, he said i should've asked earlier before coming to the window with a rude/sassy tone. he then proceeded to charge me wrong for the drink even though i said i wanted to use my free reward. (i still haven't got my starbucks money back by the way even though he used my free reward). while he was grabbing my drinks, he was acting annoyed while talking to his fellow co workers. on top of that, my order was made wrong and the coffee was cold by the time we received it. i will never be returning to this starbucks location again thanks to the horrible customer service i received.
a very handy place for a starbucks. good coffee, always friendly staff. often has a line.

i love coming to this starbucks location.. westpark village is a very pet friendly neighborhood, which is a plus because not many businesses are pet friendly anymore. the staff is very friendly, accommodating and they work as a team to get all customers in and out as quickly as possible.

i saw one of the girls at the dental office with a refreshing pink drink.. asked her what it was and she said it was "the pink drink"... so i am easily influenced.. and since the hubby was in getting his check up, off i went. we haven't been to this starbucks, so i was impressed not having to wait on a long line. i love looking at all the starbucks cups and mugs... i walked back with 2 pink drinks and also a bottle of their vanilla syrup.. i could never get any stores to sell them to me, but this time i lucked out! i know i can make my own syrup, but this was a nice treat. the drink was refreshing, but a tad too sweet , i'll get my iced carmel macchiato next time.

liberal party rejects! well below standards in customer service all served up w/ a side of attitude that puts patrons off. the conversations the employees share about other customers is such a sad thing to hear.

nice, clean and nice size starbucks! plenty of seating inside and out! always a decent crowd. plenty of parking with a short walk to the doors. this is one of my preferred starbucks and when in that area i like to stop for a drink and that's where they lose that last star!! i wanted to try the new nitro cold brew and for a grande with a mummy cake pop for my daughter...$7.10!!!!! seriously???!!! so i believe that put the nitro in the $5 something range!!!!! it was good but definitely won't be buying another one anytime soon!!!!

i usually have a good experience here, but yesterday when i tried to call in a traveler for today the phone just kept ringing and ringing! i've called before with no problems so i know the number is right, and i even waited and tried again a few minutes later, but still nothing. at least answer the phone and put me on hold while you finish up with the other customers.
due to covid 19 it's the law to wear masks and whenever i go, there are are few that don't wear them drinks aren't made correct ether food is uncooked
i hope the blonde was fired immediately after refusing to let the officer use the restroom!!!!

go here frequently and the baristas are always very nice and friendly. drinks are good also, one if the very few starbucks i have found that add the chocolate shavings to the peppermint mocha (and i have been to numerous ones in other states) so that alone deserves 5 stars!!

horrible service. after 15 min waiting on a drink, when i asked the barista, she said she didn't have my order and ignored me. like i didn't exist... i had to return back in line to have the cashier help me. when he asked her about my drink, she said she already made it.... well, how about you make it again since i didn't get it? and not let me waste another 5 min?
really slow. workers standing around. more efficiency especially for airport . was hoping to get quick coffee before flight. 20 min later

this review is for the drive thru only... this starbucks is very fast and the staff is so friendly! i have been several now and the staff remembers me. i just think thats awesome! the coffee is always right and perfect every time. there are other starbucks close by, but this one is the best by far. i would suggest this one over the others!

this is the worse starbucks! i have been twice in the past week and ordered through the app, which stated it was a 1-4 minute ticket time. i live in new orleans east and i order a latte while i was 20mins away and once i reached the store my coffee wasn't ready. they are extremely slow and should hire more staff for the morning rush! i had to cancel my order twice within the last week. i prefer to order from starbucks on st claude!

this is my go to starbucks location because i live close to there. never had a bad experience coming here. the people that work here have always been friendly and courteous in my personal experience. they keep the inside of the store clean and organized and service is fast and efficient. i got the iced caramel macchiato and they made it well. sometimes, some places will put too much ice in the drink and it feels very watered down or it feels like you're getting way less than what you paid for. but here, they don't over ice. they're also generous with the caramel and you get a ton on both the bottom of the cup and on top of your drink. the only real downside to this location is because the store is located on the corner of a busy intersection, the small parking lot means that parking can be really limited at times. during a busy afternoon, the drive thru line can snake around the building and really spill over and hold up traffic. but other than that, good location. will keep coming back here :)

this morning i went through the drive thru at around 8:50ish. the girl who came over the speaker was very snooty... i didn't mind, but when i got to the window she was again super sassy. like she was annoyed beyond annoyance.... in that, i accidentally drove off without my drink because the way she was acting really bothered me, that i just wanted to leave. so i go inside to get my drink... and super annoyed she hands it to me with so much attitude, like i ruined her life my by mistake. on top of that, i accidentally forgot my mask.. (because i was focused on my mistake & late for work) to which she scolded me for not having.... like i was a child who was caught red handed in a very bad act. whoever this girl is, she should be on mop or stock duty.. or find another job where she isn't interacting with customers. usually the service is great here, but after today... i won't ever go back there. i didn't get her name, but she was either asian/hispanic with fake blonde hair... be aware of the negative nancy! she's more bitter than the pikes brew!
terrible service inside they waited on everybody but me then they told me all we have to make more coffee were out i sat there for 10 minutes very frustrating
lines were long and it took a long time to get two ice teas. one ice tea came and the other too another 5 mins.
very green apron! love the crew :) these guys are the best starbucks in the world!!!

first time ever asked to sing my order in the drive through... crazy fun. always a pleasant experience each time with the staff. sure know how to keep the customers returning not just for the great beverages and food.

i've always had good experiences in this location. they are very friendly and i even scored a free drink the other day. i enjoy stopping in this particular starbucks. i docked one point because the parking lot is annoying. it is hard to find a spot and easily get in and out of it. once you get parked though, its worth it.

asked for a $15 reload on my card. $50 was put on. went back to have it corrected. alexis was very kind however, her manager lori was not. not only was her attire not of the starbucks representative but her attitude was far from matching as well. before she would even refund the $50 i had to pay the $9 and change for the coffee ( you think she would have comped that)... the incompetent manager did not refund the $50 in fact she charged me $50 more. after all said and done i'm sure corporate will be having a firm chat with her.

i typically will make the u turn to stop here since i prefer starbucks coffee to dd. recently the service has gone way downhill! the people who currently work here are indifferent and unprofessional. last week i stopped for a black coffee at the drive-thru. i received the wrong change and drink- upon informing the barista, i waited for over 5 minutes for a plain cup of coffee. to top it off, the barista told me i was wrong, rolled her eyes at me and did not apologize at all. i will not be back to the drive-thru after many negative experiences.

thanks for being open at 515. good to know as we were headed to the airport. when asked about the protein packs they were eagerly making them in the back. quick to help out. clean place & good seating options available.
i enjoy going to this starbucks! my order is always received in a timely manner. the staff is always friendly. my faves are doug, ian, nathan, rachel, and isaiah!

the starbucks location at gate e29 usually gives great service. however, today at around noon, i ordered a grande peppermint mocha frappuccino with coconut milk. she asked if i still wanted whipped cream. i told her yes. when i saw the young lady preparing a hot drink, i asked her if that was the frappuccino. she snapped and told me that i didn't order a frappuccino. i told her that i did and apologized if she "misheard" me. she finishes making the drink and throws it at me without saying a word. her attitude was very foul and should not be on display at a place of business. we all have bad days but if she was having one, she should've taken a break to get herself together. i travel ever week for business and stop by this starbucks frequently. most of the time, the employees are friendly but this girl was the pits. she needs coaching and development in dealing with the public.

i've been to a lot of starbucks in my 30 years on this earth. but wow!!! this one sucks. ordered my normal grande latte. they didn't have hot lids for grande or venti cups. said i would take it without a lid, but they wouldn't give it to me without a lid. so i settled for a tall. they don't accept rewards because they are a licensed store, and then barista messed up my very simple drink.

i was so happy to go to this starbucks! they filled up my drink all the way to the point where it was overfilling. plus the barista said they ran out of strawberry acai but they actually had enough for just one more and i was so happy this literally made my day

communication between all employees should be first and foremost. today it clearly wasn't a priority for them. as i ordered a coffee and oatmeal and paid for it using my debit card, it took them over 15 minutes to tell me, we're sorry, but we are out of oatmeal. seriously? even though they refunded me the difference via same pay form, it's something they should have known they didn't have. now more so since they prioritize the drive through and call in orders.

i come through the drive-thru every morning for my trenta iced coffee double expresso. matt is generally at this window. he is so nice, smiling and helps start my morning out right. i am moving to alaska and will miss the morning starbucks crew which have always made me smile.

i love this starbucks!! the 24hrs is enough to make them better than all other bucks. i come here almost ever day. the drive through is always on bang though. they lose a star for the slow part but it's fine with me because i never just walk in. i have never had a problem. one employee even gave me her markout try 3 pumps of pumpkin spice in a hit chocolate!!

had an issue with my drink with the other star bucks a few blocks down. ordered a pink drink and they filled up the whole cup with ice. after walking to the beach noticed this star bucks and asked them for water to mix up my pink drink. they said not to worry and made me another one with limited ice. great service and would recommend to go to this one if you are by the santa barbara area.
nice starbucks. locations within stores and airports are always noisier. service was good. friendly barista. my chai was perfect. plentiful table space to fit snd relax before or after shopping.

this is the only starbucks i go too! i'm in love with all the staff! there's one in particular his name is gizz and he's the sweetest person i've ever talked too! he's a tall boy with dirty blonde hair and he always perfects my drinks and when i don't know what i want he makes it perfectly!

quick and easy to order, especially with the mobile app. the staff has always been friendly and helpful. the menu is large with coffee being the primary option. there are a number of drinks for none coffee people and kids. starbucks is my go to place for dark, rich, and delicious coffee!

i love that they have a drive through! i work in the area and it's very quick and convenient to just pass through. my favorites are the pink drink, caramel macchiato (with an extra shot when i need one lol), and the almond milk cinnamon macchiato! so delicious i know it's new but i hope they keep it around. if you have the starbucks app you can place your order ahead of time and that way it's ready when u get their to pick it up fast. and when i'm hungry my favorite treats are the birthday cake flavored cake pops or the rice krispy squares. i come here at least twice a week and have never had an issue, the drive thru line moves pretty fast and it gets me caffeinated on time! thanks starbucks!

i'd say this is your average starbucks with the added benefit of never being ridiculously packed. you generally know what to expect from the products and the quality doesn't deviate from what you'd expect from a starbucks just about anywhere in the country. added bonus because the employees are generally nice and don't rush you with your order (probably because the lines are never super long). the space is also really clean so i have no issues hanging out and doing some studying or suggesting it as a meet up place for coffee with friends in the area. of course, if you want stellar coffee, there are other places in philly that will satisfy that need, but if you want starbucks, then this one will do the trick. if you've ever been to a starbucks before, then at the very least you'll know what to expect when you walk inside.

i've had no problems with this location. service is fairly speedy. sometimes the employees are a little short, but there's often a line/people trying to book it to their gate so chattiness doesn't serve anyone well. whenever i've thanked the person handing me my drink i've gotten a genuine you're welcome/have a good day/etc. on my most recent visit my frappucino was a little more liquid-y than frozen, which i actually preferred. it kept the bottom from becoming a flavorless pile of snow. if you can snag a seat, the chairs in their lounge area across from the counter are considerably more comfortable than the airport seating by the gates. it gets a bit loud with the blenders, but it's not overwhelming. long story short - it's a starbucks in an airport; either you want it or you don't.
great place to have a sbux coffee but only if you are being served by susan,dana or christie...

this starbucks location on hillsborough avenue in tampa is a well managed starbucks location that is efficient at keeping everything moving and getting your order ready. the staff here is very friendly and accommodating to make sure that everything is prepared properly. good experience every time i have been here.

i did a mobile order and went and sat inside to wait. it had already been 20 minutes and people kept waking in and getting there drinks (who ordered 15 minutes behind me) while i was still waiting. very slow.

two days ago i was came in for an iced coffee, and while nothing was wrong with my drink, there was something terribly wrong with my service. the girl taking my order was not over friendly, and not outright rude, but less enthusiastic than i'd expect. after almost sliding my card before knowing it had a chip reader, she snapped "hold on." at me, which kind of threw me off because as someone who works in retail, i would never treat a customer with that tone. but this is the real kicker- while my receipt is printing, i notice she begins looking down and what do you know, she pulls her phone out of her apron behind the cash register and starts texting while my receipt has already printed and i am standing there waiting for her to hand it to me. i will also mention that it was around 5pm and there were about 4 people in line behind me, so she stood there texting while we all waited for her service. i was appalled and actually couldn't believe how dumb someone could be to do that, right then, on the job.

this location gets crazy in the morning and around lunch times, even in the summer. because of the high volume, they are often out of some things, like sandwiches and baked goods, so you can only really rely on the drinks. some baristas are sweet, others are there just to get the job done. there are two levels which is nice for meeting with a friend or getting some work done.

first of all, i am not one to complain. i am a loyal starbucks customer but would not recommend this site with current front of store staffing. in the 15 minutes i was in the store i observed that most food orders were either forgotten to be processed or resulted in lengthy delays. i witnessed multiple customers leave because of how slow the ordering process was and the lack of customer service. in my little time at the store this morning i saw three drive-thru customers come back in to get their order corrected.as i heard one drive-thru customer say when they pulled away from the window-huge fail at starbucks today.

they serve coffee flavored water! don't mess with me i am from nyc and need my caffeine! but they get 2 stars because their bathroom is the cleanest i have seen on the east coast! it seems the further you get away from nyc the cleaner the bathrooms!

it's the holiday weekend and everyone is ready to get out of here so they started breaking down about 45 min in advance lol i get it... but because we were already sitting here i feel a little awkward. they were nice though and didn't complain at me. they warmed up my chocolate croissant just how i like and the cc cookies were really big. the kids loved them. the starbucks is fairly good size. the music was nice, too. no problem taking my order or anything so it was a nice stop.

dear mass ave, why, oh why, do you not have a local coffee shop along your street? with so many wonderful local coffee roasters, i hope this problem is fixed in the near future. until then, this starbucks will have to do. it's a tight squeeze with limited seating and seems like there is constant traffic flow throughout the day (surprise, surprise). hands down the coolest part is the walk up window. you read that right: no drive thru, but a walk up window. absolutely genius. probably cuts down on traffic jams in the store during busy times of day.
fast service if no line. if more than 3 in line plan a 15 min wait. not staff fault just lots of spring break fraps. nice staff once ordered too 3 mins w hot sandwich. gold card worked fine on phone

after the unpleasant visit to the starbucks on whyte ave, i felt the need to head to a spot that i know delivers. imagine my surprise when i discovered that this one wasn't listed on yelp. so, in addition to a coffee, i get to write a first review. yay me. location wise, nothing spectacular here. it's in the middle of a retail park, so not a lot of foot traffic to watch and make fun of. yes, i'm one of those people. it is, however, clean, the staff are friendly and competent, and they have pictures of some of the local police squads on the walls. any place that shows such obvious support for law enforcement gets my business. it's also close to best buy, so once i get my techno-geek fix, i can also get my caffeine fix. one stop shopping for addictions. can't go wrong there.

strawberry smoothie, you are too good to me. if you're still okay with drinking cold drinks before work when it's 20 degrees outside, head to starbucks. the staff is friendly, the drinks are delicious (although they are overpriced) and all of the christmas goodies inside are awesome. great place to relax or prep for a work day. see you again soon southport starbucks!

sad to give my old favorite only 3 stars but man it is just the slowest starbucks. it's so small that they really have to move the drinks faster as there isn't a comfortable area to wait when it's crowded like today. there isn't a drive thru which has never been an issue for me in the past but it's been 2 years since i've visited and i could tell there was a major difference this time. i think with as much business that this location does, they need more than 2 people working the counter. our drinks were good and hot. i just hope they figure out how to speed up the process.

i ordered a caramel frap with add shot and when i took my first sip, had no flavor at all! taste like blended iced water! so i told the lady there was no flavor at all so she remade it, did not apologize and then when i received my remake she did not add the shot so when i brought that up to her she gave a face and got so irritated and the other lady ended up just remaking. i dealt with that third remake but was still not satisfied! they did no take their time to make the drinks or they need more training cause this one had a little bit of flavor. worst starbucks i've ever been too! you would think it would be better quality considering it's located in a hotel / casino. staff was not happy or friendly, horrible customer service.

ordered ahead and still waited over 20 minutes for my food item which i never received. i asked several times and was told "it's coming, we are really backed up". when people behind me received their items before me, i had no choice but to leave without my sandwich as i was late for work due to waiting 20 minutes. starbucks has gone so downhill

i stopped in here to get a macchiato and to have a little time to myself to read. it was pretty busy inside and a new person was still in training. after waiting a few minutes and everyone behind me already gone another young woman noticed me waiting so she checked on the person making my drink, since he seemed to be having a little trouble she happily took the macchiato he was trying to make and dumped it and started over again showing him how it was done. i'm so happy she did start over again to make sure my drink was just as i had ordered and expected it to be. ( to keep it vegan you just hold the caramel drizzle and use soy milk)
awesome service by scott and chara- not only were they kind and friendly but provided top notch service! kudos

coffee is coffee right?-so this location has that hands down. the employees seem disgruntle.. i understand this location is fast paced and you may not always want to smile, but you should!! standing in front of one employee for at least two minutes only for her to not even look up at me but say "she can help you over there" is poor customer service. to have someone wait 10-15 minutes for a coffee and not even be greeted is the bare minimum this location should give. the lady who waited on me was stone faced and transactional ... didn't even offer me a receipt, only, "you can wait at the end for your coffee". well thank you for putting my order in, and allowing me to pay 6$.... i guess good customer service just does not exist anymore.
quite possibly the worst service at a starbucks i've ever been to. severely understaffed with folks who don't really care. went 2 days in a row, simply horrible.
i like this location alot. everyone is really friendly and good customer service. i go there almost every day. this is one of my favorite starbucks coffee location.

they are so rude. yesterday we wanted useing restroom at 9:40pm but the doors were locked. however they cleaned the restroom at 8:45pm and there's no problem. we drunk lots of coffee, tea so we needed to use it. staff told that go to a public restroom. and the place open until 10:30pm. this is the first time we had problem with starbucks. they never do that to their customers. they do all customers after tried to us.
everytime i come here they do not have the supplies to make the drink i get. very rude staff!
i've had this starbucks a coupleof times and its okay but my co-workers just got back from their daily trip and said this one raised their prices by a lot.
no decaf, no sugar in the raw or syrup, trash cans over flowing at 11am. didnt call when order was ready. not impressed.
reliably good coffee with mediocre service. pastries and sandwiches are made off-site, so quality would be the same as all other starbucks concessions. average cleanliness.
very accommodating, socially distanced and clean! thomas was extremely helpful in facilitating a large complex order, which saved my production crew! will be coming back here daily!

worst starbucks ever!! do yourself a favor by not going there. they took an hour to make one frappe and served so many who came after us. we were driving back from philly and wanted a cup of coffee only. i would not recommend this place to people who are in hurry. i would not even give one star to this place.

i like all starbucks in general, so even though this one is inside the mall = no seats, always long lines, i still like it. i'm taking 1 star away because sometimes i do have to wait a long time for my drink. as long as the drinks are made right, i'm not complaining.

i've been here many times and haven't had too much of a problem with the employees here. frappuccinos are usually really good and the environment is relaxing, but this one isn't really for people who are short on time as it usually takes a while to make their coffee.

i felt my coffee very light and opened it and it was almost halfway full. i don't know if it's because it was almost closing time and they didn't want to waste time doing my drink but this is not okay. the simplest and smallest drink and they couldn't fill it up

i feel like this is a typical starbucks. i've never had a rude encounter with anyone behind the counter, and they're fast and efficient getting me my post-work pick-me-up. the space is smaller than most starbucks i've been to, but there is a small outdoor patio, and i usually get my drink to go, regardless.
big open windows, great customer service and clean atmosphere! if i was to have a business meeting, this would be a nice location in which there are multiple tables for 8 occupants.

ordered hot coffee in the drive thru. coffee came out cold! in a hot coffee cup. i'm really confused because it tastes like iced coffee it was ridiculous. i had to go through the drive they once again and return my 'hot'coffee for a hot coffee. it was a waste of time and we did not get anything from them for our wasted time or our inconvenience. i will be writing to starbucks about this. not good business. the location was 5425 us hwy 19 new port richey, fl.
friendly service at starbucks. service was a little bit slow but it was morning and you expect a wait. i like the blonde coffee because i like lighter coffee. i appreciate that they give an option.

i came here randomly and actually tried the online purchasing option. it worked very well and walked right in and was handed my drink. the place has a decent amount of seating options. the employees here very nice and overall place is clean. i'm not too sure about the bathrooms though. the drink was very good and the parking here is great unlike over crowded philadelphia. i felt comfortable hanging out here and enjoyed relaxing and consuming my beverage. i will for sure stop by again when i'm in the area.

this store must have really poor management the young women in the store were working in ridiculous heat with no ac - it was cooler outside!!!! and they were still quick and professional. it was terrible

this is not the first time i've been to this starbucks location. this visit unfortunately has been one of the worst with the employees attention to their customers. mobile order was placed via starbucks app and since the counter was busy at the time i walked in, i didn't notify the employees that i am waiting. 25 minutes past and the counter was cleared of people waiting so i asked the employee if my order is ready. he said initially that the didn't get the order. i had to point out to him that the mobile order sticker is still at the printer and not being taken care of. after 32 minutes of waiting i got my order and a "sorry about that". i asked the manager to be notified that a simple mobile order more than 30 minute and no corrective action was undertaken. the employee said "sure" and continued washing his cup in sink as if nothing happened.

who doesn't love starbucks??? this location is not the best but it gets the job done. don't complain about drive thru, the whole purpose of drive through is for convenience of not getting ur ass up out of the car and getting it yourself, so for a place that makes ur drink right on the spot why would you not expect to wait??? the baristas in here are totally nice. not too big inside but that does not stop the laptop crews from coming inside, makes you think who does not have wifi at home...

i am a fan of starbucks, but not of this location. in the past i have had issues with drink quality, and didn't want to come back, but with the los altos store being closed (temporarily) i decided to give this location another try. on this day 12/13, i tried to do a mobile, order but the store was not listed. i went on the webpage, no mobile orders available (really?). i decided to head to the location, drive through only, so i go through drive through. half a dozen cars ahead of me (not uncommon). i try to place my order (no peppermint syrup), ok so i try to get a tray of cranberry bliss (they were out), so i don't want anything, but have to sit in the drive through for awhile. side note: i went to the los altos location on wednesday, mobile ordered the items i couldn't get at this location, went through the drive through and received them both as expected.

been here two times and this is the second time they have forgotten my order. i waited over 10 minutes while others (6 people) behind me got their orders ahead of mine. i had to go over to the barista and tell them that i hadn't received my order after waiting another 5 minutes. they need to re-think their service order priority.
out of lemonade wtf. not welcoming to customers. i definitely would recommend a different location

this is a pretty large starbucks. they have couches and benches to hang out or to work on stuff. i just started working across the street so i will be visiting them frequently, i'm sure. staff is amazingly friendly and helpful. woo hoo!

a starbucks is a starbucks is a starbucks. there's a reason these places are so popular, and it's not because they each exhibit a sense of individuality. walk into a starbucks on the south side, like this one, and your experience will most likely be the same as walking into one on the west end or north side. i rather like the feeling; when i'm going for coffee, i want to be able to relax in a comfortable, familiar setting. i'm also currently addicted to these places, since they brought back the holiday special beverages. yum! unfortunately, this one isn't all that great for people watching, as it's right in the middle of a shopping mall parking lot. ah, well - can't win them all.

this is my all-time favorite starbucks location! i have been a loyal starbucks gold card member for some years. there have been a lot of good, even some great locations... but this one by far is my favorite. it is very convenient for me because it is on my way to work, but there are times i have had to go to other locations for different reasons. every time i do, i am disappointed because of the high bar this location has set. the manager is exceptionally helpful, friendly and professional. the staff is amazing. friendly, upbeat, proficient. i have never had problems with my order. they're smiles make my day! kudos! i'm a fan! ~annie kidd
nice to have inside frys...they are always busy whenever i am there...only go to starbucks when i have a gift card but i like to go on their sale price days. service is pretty quick.

this starbucks is a hit or miss! i have gone there every day for the past 8 years! sometimes the coffee is good. sometimes awful! the lines are ridiculous! weekends i go to hendersonville as you may as well park at this one! the people there are very friendly but they get my coffee wrong at least 4 days out of 7! if this continues i will start making y on coffee at home!

this starbucks is near my office, so i've gone a bunch of times for lunch. i can tell you that both their pre-packaged lunches and their frappacinos and teas are up to par, and the service is prompt and efficient. i usually come mid to late afternoons, and even then it is busy but i can always find a spot. it seems to be a favorite for tutors and highpowered business people in particular. i can't vouch for early mornings waits, but from what i've seen this location is a good one.

the staff here clearly enjoys working here. always very lively here, which is appreciated. although the lounge area is "average" when you consider tables to relax & converse at, there is outdoor seating that makes up for it. as far as seasonal themes to market products, this location offers such as "frappuchino friday."the ladies dress up hawaiian style, and the men wear a don ho hawaii 5-0 shirt. it makes for good fun. the products are still very good, as well as certain new promotional ones such as oprah's chai latte. parking in this starbuck's front lot can be challenging, particularly with the last two parking spaces on the front right (very tight). i would recommend parking in the adjacent shopping center lot and just walking over during the busy times of the day (early morning, late afternoon). overall, a pretty good venue.

fix the drive thru! quality of service - 5 friendliness of employees - 5 speed of drive thru service - 1 if someone gets a complicated order or one that takes a lot of time have them pull forward and keep the line moving. easy fix.

i just moved to the area, and i've gone to this location twice. both of the times i went there i waited for 25 minutes in the drive-through when there was only five cars in front of me both times. i don't understand why they are so slow here at this location, i've never experienced service like this at any other starbucks location.

i have had multiple bad experiences at this location. the staff doesn't seem to know what's going on. impossible to get your order right when you order through the app (which is pretty difficult to do). one time i ordered through the app and they ended up getting so busy that they never even completed the order. my boyfriend waited for 30 minutes and left with nothing (and not even his money back). they are always sold out of stuff. really hoping they get better soon because there is no other starbucks nearby.

i usually dont write reviews for big chain restaurants bc its the same everywhere. but the starbucks is the best ever. quiet, spacious and clean. the staffs are nice and friendly. they also give you left over drinks with smiley face on them. would love to come here more often.
3.5 stars my neighborhood starbucks.. fast and always friendly service. the only thing that sucks is the lack of parking.

i came today 2/19/21 at 8:50 the door was already closed! and they should be closed by 9pm and also they ladies was inside and they saw me and no one opened however they went out from the store after 9 so i don't find any reason as they closing early and also every one of them was having more than one drink! and was laughing and no one cared as the three ladies closed early than 9pm as the door should be closed by 9! last time i will come to this store and i don't recommend it to anyoneyou can save time and go to another store.

i love this starbucks location. the staff is super nice - not to mention quick and efficient. i've never had a problem with my order not being right and i've never had to wait more than a few minutes to complete my order from beginning to end. i highly recommend this starbucks - one of the best in tucson!

these guys are actually pretty good at taking orders and making drinks. i went in and asked for the crunchberry frappe. they not only knew what that was, but also made it without any fuss. i also got a half decent chai out of them... i'd still go someplace else for chai tho.... otherwise the staff was very good, fast, and even the atmosphere was chill.
i frequent this location often and kingston is always there making sure my order is right with a smile!! hope to see him promoted soon within the organization.
my local sb but its a good one. big open spacing with high and low seating and some 2 person corners too.

love this starbucks! one of my fave locations... partially cause i can walk there from my house.. lol. staff is super friendly and always happy to accomadate any request. love sitting out on the patio in the cooler air and watch traffic or chill inside on the couch with friends. cake pops are my new fave thing! def worth you checking them out!

we come to this starbucks at least once every two weeks if not every week. it is conveniently located in between our house in orlando and my parent's house in tampa. this is by far the slowest starbucks we have ever been to... consistently. service is poor, you would be lucky if you get much more conversation than 'what can we get for you'. we thought that this time we would go inside to speed things up and get a better experience but that didn't change anything.
nice guys here but very slow. very slow. can't even go here on a friday morning because it usually takes so long.

some people may hate chain retail coffee shops, but this is as good as it gets in arnold! i particularly enjoy starbucks because the service is almost always enjoyable and there is free wi-fi in the place. there are a lot of nice cozy chairs and i sometimes manage to plop here with a good book instead of the local library. (the library does tend to be a bit loud, but that is ok.) i can order a variety of drinks that can be syled according to my preferences. i always order the skinny version of an iced caramel machiatto. i always get my drink pretty quickly. i agree with other reviewers, they do need to add some more parking spots, but this is not a huge negative, because the store had to do with what was given to them.

the best in town. love the clover brewed coffee. i can get any coffee either hot or iced. they take time to get to know you when you come in often. if you are so inclined, you can have a beer or some wine.
worst starbucks on the beach. staff are rude, uneducated in their line of work resulting in never get my drink correct!!! go to starbucks by the hilton hotel 10/10 for that place.

i'm not an avid starbuck's goer, but this is hands down one of the best starbuck's around. there's much to love about this shop, it has ample parking next door and outdoor seating, the baristas are all friendly and helpful, the prices are good and of course the drinks!! i'm a huge fan of the hot chocolate/chocolate croissant combo (too much chocolate? never!). there are also alot of people who come here to work on their laptops, and i don't blame here i often consider coming here myself to write. i've made many runs here with my sister and my friends before we take the train and if i came through lansdale i would stop in more, it is worth it!
maliyah and jordan were the best servers at ihop. they were professional, courteous, efficient and gracious. we loved having them as waitresses and we will be back again!

horrible bathroom. i took my three year old son into the bathroom today and had a very difficult time helping him use the bathroom because starbucks had a blue light fixture in the bathroom. i could barely see anything. starbucks may have a reason for the blue light (drug use detterance??) but it's not family friendly. that issue aside, there is no arguable reason why the bathroom had no toilet tissue! that's right; there was not a shred of toilet tissue in the bathroom. fortunately, my son had to do #1 and not #2. but wait, there's more. we went to wash our hands and couldn't find a soap dispenser. maybe it was there but we couldn't see much (remember the blue light?). there was, however, a gallon jug of soap nearby. lot's of fun. not.

awful service and rude staff. came at 5:55 for a flat white and was told l "should've come earlier" because now is the time they clean the machines. just disgusting and i should have never heard about any cleaning of machines. none of that is my concern. i came for coffee!

small, quiet, attached to hampton inns. all the handicapped sports were taken by enormous pickup truck with no stickers or disabled plates, super frustrating. coffee was hot and strong just like my husband likes. i like the free water to drink in the car. good coffee. impossible parking.

omg. this place keeps getting worse. truth. i have been waiting in line for 10 minutes. i am serious. if my eyes weren't burning with fire bc i only had 4 hrs of sleep i would have pulled off. this is ridiculous. officially done with this location

this location is in a great area and is kept very clean compared to other starbucks. as a past starbucks employee from canada, i would say it's actually the cleanest i've ever seen for how big the store actually is. it is quite busy, but never cramped, and it's not the store's fault for the traffic of customers it receives, so i'm not sure why there are so many bad ratings based on how "swamped" it is; also, every time i go in (mid-day) there is hardly anyone there and always a great selection of seating. on top of that, the staff and baristas and very friendly, efficient, and put in effort into their minimum wage jobs. you can tell that they're happy to be there and never give attitude. good job to this location for meeting all the points.

i'm tyler new store manager at a neighboring retail store . i practically come here everyday . some days twice a day . i order the same drink every morning . pictured below . where is the consistency? i go to many other starbucks and order the same drink with no issue . i've told many associates that work there about how the drink should be made and the color of it . one time the girl made my drink over for me because it was too dark ( like had no lemonade) , when she handed to me she said " here you go , it's on the house ." no it's not on the house , i've paid for it and you made it wrong. so for it to have been on the house , a refund would have had to been made . today when i order my drink ( pictured below) it was wrong . i'm tired of going back and forth over lemonade. i've been late to work because of this issue. just make the drink according to the option offered on your app. love starbucks but the one on concord pike has a difficult time with making a half black iced tea, half lemonade, 11 pumps of liquid sugar cane and lite ice .

it really was just too slow. there was a line of drinks which takes time; however, the two other gals could have helped the girl on bar this evening as they were leaning against the counter and she was trying to keep up with all the drinks. my latte tasted fine, the store was tidy but i would not recommend if you are short on time.
place is dirty and loud. the voices echo. i expect a big chain like starbucks should be held to high standards. staff was decent. my drink was ok

i don't like to leave 1 star reviews but this is the slowest starbucks ever. nothing like paying $200 for a tea and waiting longer than normal. i know this is a first world problem. we are paying for the service and speed. not here.
place is cute, but there's a rude older woman that works here. everyone else seemed nice though!

i've yet to have good luck with this location. usually, i go through drive thru which is a 20 minute wait minimum. today, the drive thru was closed so i went in. between waiting in line and receiving my drink, the wait was also about 20 minutes but wasn't bad considering the volume. the problem is my drink was wrong and i ended up tossing it in the trash. so i basically waited 20 minutes to throw $5 in the trash. coffee is a rare treat for me but i've come to realize that it usually just sours my mood to come here. my order was a venti sweet cream cold brew - 2 ingredients essentially. i got black coffee with a cold foam.
great starbucks location-christine was very helpful and courteous..great friendly staff and awesome drinks and food
starbucks are generally great, this one is no different. consistent great service and good chai lattes! their bacon gouda is the bomb also.

i like.that they have added some things to their menu .the slow roasted ham and swiss has.become my new favorite. catherine the manager is so sweet and always on top of things. i usually get the same thing but from time to time i switch it up and recently tried the blackberry mojito iced tea , boy was it refreshing . i'd also like to give special nod to avery he's always so friendly and goes out of his way to be helpful. great job dude :-)
solid starbucks. staff is a bit rough but that's what you get taking 'only stl city residents' to work in a fancy coffee shop. "ok... this is a latte..." yeah.

cannot believe this location is at a great location and the baristas not so much. thought i was in a dd, simple ice tea was all wrong. got a grande instead of a venti, extra sweet, instead of what i asked, and light ice, when asked for extra ice.

i visited this starbucks around 2 p.m. on a saturday, so the cacophony of the typical weekday review is certainly not reflected here. the place was practically empty. the service was friendly enough. dare i say, with its tables and plush red chairs, that it was even cozy. i'm from nyc. i've put up with a lot of worse starbucks. ha! like i said, i can't speak for weekdays at this place, but for a quick coffee or tea on the weekend if you're in the vicinity, i can definitely give this place a good mark.

i rushed to starbucks because it said they close at 10pm and i get there right at 9:30pm and they tell me their closed. i tell the barrista i thought you guys closed at 10pm and she said on thursday's we close at 9:30pm they need to fix their hourly schedule i'm highly unsatisfied and disappointed.

this the worst starbucks we have been to. after waiting a long wait time, i placed my order for just a chocolate croissant. the cashier didn't greet customers and wasn't friendly despite being early in the morning. she at least took my order quickly and handed the wrapped to someone else (usually the cashier takes it out and warms it up). well after a while, i started seeing people that were behind getting their drinks and breakfast items. i then proceeded to ask where was my croissant because it was just a pastry. then a woman said it was next and that she was busy making sandwiches and it would take 18 seconds. i guess she forgot or didn't get to drink her coffee this morning because she didn't get those sandwich order after i had placed mine. then i asked to speak to a manager and she said she was one. i believe she said her name was kg when i asked. i then let her know it was poor management on her end not to know how to prioritize which orders should go out first. i let her know i was before those items that she choose to do first. her poor judgement is poor reflection of her leadership role to her employees. kg

i go to this starbucks at least 4 times a week! they never are very happy! they are always out of drink trays and drink stoppers! today they told me they don't get drink stoppers anymore! the coffee was running down both cups and they didn't offer to clean off! i will not being spending my money at this starbucks anymore! very rude and not fully stocks! at $4.80 a drink they need to have the supplies!

this is one of the worst starbucks. drink orders are repeatedly wrong, the baristas spend more time socializing with each then paying attention to the customers, and you need to allot extra time because the staff is extremely slow!

i absolutely love this starbuck's location! i work in this building and i have to say the crew here led by zeb is amazing. they are located right in the hustle and bustle of downtown indy on the circle so it is constantly busy yet the line is always flowing. they are friendly, generous, attentive and fast. they remember our orders and our names and they always have a great upbeat attitude. when asked, the team enthusiastically gives spot on suggestions as well as clarifications when you don't quite know or understand how to ask for what you want. i watched a biography of the history of starbuck's this weekend on cnbc and feel that howard schultz would be proud of this location, they definitely embody the starbuck's philosophy and culture. i get a grande pike everyday and it really is just a better cup of coffee. the outdoor seating is nice too in the summer, great people watching as there is always something going on on the circle.

this starbucks is so slow the woman behind me left. she travels out of bna regularly and she still didn't have enough time to place her order and get a drink. they only have one person at the register and one poor person making all of the drinks. i see another employee is in the drink area now but the line is still barely moving. i got my drink, a grande iced latte, but it tastes a little off.
nice people. don't bother with the egg nog latte because they have the flavor of warm milk. the pumpkin spice latte misses the mark as well.

i love starbucks, so i've been to lots of different locations, and this one is by far the best! i must say, i only use the drive through, so i can't speak to service/atmosphere inside. i always get the same drink, and it is the most consistent i have ever had. most places your drink always tastes different, a least a little bit. but here, always perfect! fastest drive through i've ever seen--they will have a line around the corner and work everyone through and be back to no line in 5 minutes, no joke! thanks for making my mornings easy and delicious :)

my go-to place every morning before i catch the train for work. the staff is nice an they make my drink the way i love it. they also know their frequent customers well. =) only downside is the parking. its awful no matter what time of the day you go there. you have to keep in mind the place is on the corner of bryn mawr rd. and it's tiny. there are only 6 parking spots, but people park their cars up against the building and 'create their own spots'.

i am appalled by the service at this location. i arrived at the bookstore with more than 45 minutes to spare before my next class (at 2:42 pm). this should be enough time to grab a starbucks and make it to class on time, right? wrong. although the location was busy, it was by far not as busy as i have seen it in the past or as busy as it usually gets during more popular times. so, i first stood in line for about 15 minutes and when i finally made it to the front of the line, the barista stepped away from the cash register to have a conversation with a coworker. after standing right in front of them for another few minutes, the barista decides that then would be an appropriate time to take my order. after i had my order taken, i proceeded to wait 27 minutes for my iced tea. when i was finally handed my iced tea, the cup was dripping tea down the sides and the lid was not properly put on. then, thirsty as ever, i took a sip of my tea (note: i order the same beverage ever. single. day.) and was shocked by the taste (or lack thereof) of my drink. the water with a shot of peach bubbles they had made me was absolutely atrocious, not to mention that i had also completely run out of time and now had to sprint to my 3:30 class. i have now learnt my lesson and will from today on, only go to the starbucks at the library. 0 stars. will not return.

always friendly here. they got busy while we were here and they handled it well. lots of customers with multiple drinks in their orders. they made great recommendations depending on my taste. they will always steer you in the right direction. if you haven't tried a clover brew, you've missed out. you can get any of their beans ground fresh and made to order, hot or cold.

bought starbucks deal on verisomo pods. buy 3 and get 20% off. i bought 4 and they would not honor 20% off the 4th box. they claim i had to buy 6 to get 20% off the 4th box. what a stupid rule, this will be my last purchase of starbucks pods.
